title: GSI creation
description: Given a table, when I create a GSI with a partition key (and optionally a sort key), it should be registered and ready to index records. Supports hash-only and hash+range configurations. Spec: features/gsi/gsi_creation.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Status: ready to implement. Did: reviewed gsi_creation.feature. Next: add Python+Rust GSI types and creation logic + step defs. Blockers: none.
